notes: Identity-architecture seam (#511), Stage 1: link-guard. Refuses to connect a Google/Microsoft account already linked (not disconnected) to a different Foldera user, in both OAuth connect callbacks; new helper findCrossUserTokenConflict in lib/auth/user-tokens.ts; friendly settings error (already_linked_elsewhere). This is the durable fix for the recurring Google reconnect (root cause: same external account linked under two identities -> provider revokes the first identity's refresh token) and the split-brain (#509). Confirmed against live data: owner Gmail synced daily Apr 8-Jun 11 then died exactly when the +nonowner test account linked the same Gmail Jun 12. Stage 2-4 (Google sole sign-in, Microsoft as a linkable surface, migrate the Microsoft-identity owner account e40b7cd8, remove AzureADProvider) are owner-gated follow-ups captured in #511. Predecessors merged: #507 (PR #508 / 9bdf478), LANDING #500 (PR #501), repoint (PR #510 / fdaf52f).
